step_by_step_reasoning: Based on the whiteboard and transcript, there are seven distinct components. 1) EKS running multi-tenant SaaS pods. 2) Aurora (Postgres) storing database schemas per tenant. 3) Transit Gateway to connect the single-tenant QuickSight environments back to Aurora. 4) Control Tower to provision new tenant AWS accounts. 5) QuickSight deployed inside the customer account for data visualization. 6) VPN connecting customer on-premises data to QuickSight. 7) Customer Data (OnPremDC) representing the bank's on-premises databases connected via VPN.

graph.name: Multi-Tenant SaaS Loan Origination with Single Tenant Data Reporting
graph.notes: A multi-tenant SaaS architecture running on EKS and Aurora PostgreSQL. Isolates analytical reporting for single tenants by automated provisioning of dedicated AWS accounts with QuickSight via AWS Control Tower.

nodes.name: EKS Pods
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Multi-tenant SaaS application running isolated pods per tenant.

nodes.name: Postgres Aurora
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Database with separate schemas per tenant to prevent data commingling.

nodes.name: Transit Gateway
nodes.notes: Peers QuickSight tenant VPCs with Postgres Aurora to fetch database views.

nodes.name: Control Tower
nodes.notes: Uses Account Factory for Terraform to automatically provision new accounts.

nodes.name: QuickSight
nodes.notes: Single-tenant reporting and BI tool pre-provisioned in each client account.

nodes.name: VPN
nodes.notes: Securely connects QuickSight to community banks' on-premises data databases.

nodes.name: Customer On-Prem DB
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Customer data hosted on-premises by external community banks.

edges.notes: EKS pods write transactional data to tenant-isolated Postgres Aurora schemas.
Control Tower automatically provisions dedicated client AWS accounts containing QuickSight.
Transit Gateway bridges connections from Aurora database schemas.
Delivers Aurora reporting data to QuickSight dashboards.
Pipes on-premises customer databases through VPN tunnel.
Funnels bank's on-premises source data into QuickSight to join with SaaS platform metrics.
